case_title: ONEMAIN FINANCIAL GROUP, LLC, AS SERVICER FOR VS. NIJAHL D MCGEE ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ONEMAIN FINANCIAL GROUP, LLC, AS SERVICER FOR ('ASF') WILMINGTON TRUST, N.A., AS ISSUER LOAN TRUSTEE FOR ONEMAIN FINANCIAL ISSUANCE TRUST 2019-2 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCGEE, NIJAHL D $10,339.03 PRINCIPAL, $464.19 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,803.22, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 210009403)
